'''鈭歴h-w-d-l''' ('''kashawdeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forebusy|forebusy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forebusy|forebusy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-w-d-l
|-
! Lemma
| kashawdeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishawdeloko|thishawdeloko]] || [[word:jishawdeloko|jishawdeloko]] || [[word:shishawdeloko|shishawdeloko]] || [[word:kishawdeloko|kishawdeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushawdeloko|thuthushawdeloko]] || [[word:jujushawdeloko|jujushawdeloko]] || [[word:shushushawdeloko|shushushawdeloko]] || [[word:kukushawdeloko|kukushawdeloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushawdeloko|thushawdeloko]] || [[word:jushawdeloko|jushawdeloko]] || [[word:shushawdeloko|shushawdeloko]] || [[word:kushawdeloko|kushawdeloko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshawdeloko|thothoshawdeloko]] || [[word:jojoshawdeloko|jojoshawdeloko]] || [[word:shoshoshawdeloko|shoshoshawdeloko]] || [[word:kokoshawdeloko|kokoshawdeloko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshawdeloko|thoshawdeloko]] || [[word:joshawdeloko|joshawdeloko]] || [[word:shoshawdeloko|shoshawdeloko]] || [[word:koshawdeloko|koshawdeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shawdeloko|th忙shawdeloko]] || [[word:j忙shawdeloko|j忙shawdeloko]] || [[word:sh忙shawdeloko|sh忙shawdeloko]] || [[word:k忙shawdeloko|k忙shawdeloko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashawdeloko|thashawdeloko]] || [[word:jashawdeloko|jashawdeloko]] || [[word:shashawdeloko|shashawdeloko]] || [[word:kashawdeloko|kashawdeloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashawdeloko|thashawdeloko]] || [[word:jashawdeloko|jashawdeloko]] || [[word:shashawdeloko|shashawdeloko]] || [[word:kashawdeloko|kashawdeloko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
